name: Paisalo Digital Limited
summary: Paisalo Digital Limited provides business loans, SME and MSME loans, and income generation loans for business/self-employment purpose in India. It offers income generation loans for purchasing seeds, fodder, cattle's, etc.; and Paisalo- Joint Liability Group loans for agriculture and allied sectors. The company was formerly known as S. E. Investments Limited and changed its name to Paisalo Digital Limited in January 2018. Paisalo Digital Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Agra, India.
